named_docs.name: Methane Emissions Measurement and Mitigation Research Consortium
named_docs.context: the Secretary shall establish and operate a Methane Emissions Measurement and Mitigation Research Consortium

named_docs.name: multiyear plan
named_docs.owner_org: Methane Emissions Measurement and Mitigation Research Consortium
named_docs.context: The Consortium shall develop and implement a multiyear plan that identifies technical goals and milestones

named_docs.name: Initial Report on Consortium Activities
named_docs.context: Not later than 18 months after the date of the enactment of this section, the Secretary shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report

named_docs.name: Annual Report on Program Activities
named_docs.context: Not later than one year after the date on which the report under subparagraph (B) is submitted and annually thereafter
